channel.title: AI Development on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in AI Development on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: security: Microsoft Build 2026: Securing code, agents, and models across the development lifecycle
item.description:
Microsoft says Build 2026 introduced MDASH and additional security capabilities aimed at securing code, agents, and models across the development lifecycle. The post frames these updates as support for fast AI development with security controls built in.

  • Source: Microsoft Security Blog

item.title: ai: What’s new in Microsoft Foundry | April 2026
item.description:
April 2026 Microsoft Foundry updates include Foundry Local GA for local AI development, GPT-5.5 support with default Tier 5 and Tier 6 quota, and new tracing, monitoring, and evaluation features for agents. The release also adds CodeAct with Hyperlight for sandboxed code execution and SDK updates for Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, .NET, and Java.

  • Source: Microsoft AI Foundry Blog
